reason: General fixed path is not safe: perspective mismatch is large and affine bilinear is slower overall on Pico2 because edge/floor handling dominates.

safe_subset: Affine interior nearest, non-negative coords, whole span inside texture, len>=4
reason: Exact on both boards and very fast once setup is amortized; needs production scanline safety/fallback implementation before source integration.

safe_subset: Affine interior bilinear, floor(x)+1/floor(y)+1 inside texture, len>=4
reason: Mostly exact; nonexact long subtexel rows have max channel error 1 and no pixels above one quantization step. Needs real shader/render validation before accepting approximate output.
Large mismatch percentages and max channel errors up to 63; not visually safe.
